spell.monkmod.spirit_sphere_summon.name: Summon Spiritual Sphere
spell.monkmod.soul_collect.name: SOUL COLLECT
spell.monkmod.spiritual_absorption.name: Spiritual Absorption
spell.monkmod.occult_impaction.name: Psychic Impact
spell.monkmod.spirit_transfer.name: Spirit Transfer
spell.monkmod.ethereal_step.name: Ethereal Step
spell.monkmod.throw_spirit_sphere.name: Throw Spiritual Sphere
spell.monkmod.spirit_sphere_summon.descr: Summons 1 Spiritual Sphere for {effect_duration} seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
spell.monkmod.soul_collect.description: Instantly grants the maximum number of Spiritual Spheres. Grants 5 spheres normally, or 6 while using the Spiritual Gauntlet.
spell.monkmod.spiritual_absorption.descr: Drains enemies around the target, dealing low damage, healing the caster, and generating 1 Spiritual Sphere per enemy hit.
spell.monkmod.occult_impaction.descripti: Consumes 1 Spiritual Sphere and deals {splash_damage} - {damage} damage to targets. Grants the Vigor Chakra effect for 4 seconds.
spell.monkmod.spirit_transfer.descriptio: Consumes 1 Spiritual Sphere and throws it at an ally, healing allies around the target and granting Vigor Chakra.
spell.monkmod.ethereal_step.description: Consumes 2 Spiritual Spheres and teleports the user up to 7 blocks forward. Grants the Spiritual Concession effect for 4 seconds.
spell.monkmod.throw_spirit_sphere.descri: Throws up to 5 Spiritual Spheres, consuming 1 Spiritual Sphere per throw. Each sphere deals {damage} damage to enemies.
effect.monkmod.spiritual_spheres.descrip: Each sphere increases Arcane Power, Spell Haste, and Attack Damage by 5%.
effect.monkmod.vigor_chakra.description: Channels vital energy, granting a 30% chance to self-cast Vigor Barrier.
effect.monkmod.vigor_barrier.description: Generates a temporary shield that scales with Arcane Power.
effect.monkmod.spiritual_concession.desc: Increases Attack Damage by 30% while active.
